name: paseo

scripts.build:daemon: npm run build --workspace=@lululau/paseo-highlight && npm run build --workspace=@lululau/paseo-relay && npm run build --workspace=@lululau/paseo-server && npm run build --workspace=@lululau/paseo-cli
scripts.typecheck:daemon: npm run typecheck --workspace=@lululau/paseo-relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@lululau/paseo-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@lululau/paseo-cli
scripts.build:desktop: npm run version:sync-internal && npm run build:web --workspace=@lululau/paseo-app && npm run build --workspace=@lululau/paseo-desktop
scripts.version: npm run version:sync-internal && npm run release:prepare && git add -A
scripts.release:check: npm run release:prepare && npm run typecheck --workspace=@lululau/paseo-highlight && npm run build --workspace=@lululau/paseo-highlight && npm run typecheck --workspace=@lululau/paseo-relay && npm run build --workspace=@lululau/paseo-relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@lululau/paseo-server && npm run build --workspace=@lululau/paseo-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@lululau/paseo-cli && npm run build --workspace=@lululau/paseo-cli && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@lululau/paseo-highlight && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@lululau/paseo-relay && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@lululau/paseo-server && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@lululau/paseo-cli
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@lululau/paseo-highlight --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@lululau/paseo-relay --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@lululau/paseo-server --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@lululau/paseo-cli --access public
scripts.release:publish: npm publish --workspace=@lululau/paseo-highlight --access public && npm publish --workspace=@lululau/paseo-relay --access public && npm publish --workspace=@lululau/paseo-server --access public && npm publish --workspace=@lululau/paseo-cli --access public
scripts.release:rc:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:rc:patch && npm run release:push
scripts.release:rc:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:rc:minor && npm run release:push
scripts.release:rc:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:rc:major && npm run release:push
scripts.release:rc:next: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:rc:next && npm run release:push
scripts.release:promote: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:promote && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:patch && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:minor && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:major && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push

description: Paseo: voice-controlled development environment with OpenAI Realtime API
